pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to support Java 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not fully support or correctly handle the `--release 21` flag or newer language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Maven compiler release target to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs, causing runtime errors or missing features when running on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JavaFX controls dependency to version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JavaFX 13 is not compatible with JDK 21; using it results in runtime linkage errors or module path issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JavaFX FXML dependency to version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JavaFX 13 is not compatible with JDK 21; using it results in runtime linkage errors or module path issues.
